---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for the SEO Content Engine
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Describe the problem you are trying to solve. What is frustrating, missing, or inefficient in the current engine?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like to see. Be as specific as possible about the expected behavior.

## Affected Area

Which part of the engine does this feature affect?

- [ ] Context layer (company context, ICP, templates)
- [ ] Skills (keyword research, article writing, SEO optimization, etc.)
- [ ] Workflows (content production pipeline, publishing flow)
- [ ] Connectors (CMS integrations, data sources)
- [ ] Quality Gate (validation, scoring, checks)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (please specify):

## Example Use Case

Describe a concrete scenario where this feature would be used. If possible, reference the RouteMaster example or a similar B2B context.

## Alternative Approaches

What other solutions or workarounds have you considered? Why is the proposed approach better?

## Implementation Notes

Optional. If you have ideas about how this could be implemented, share them here. Consider:

- Which existing skills or workflows would need to change?
- Are new context files or templates required?
- Does this introduce any new dependencies?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references that help explain the request.
